evals.prompt: Write a draft HiGantic blog post about using AI agents to triage inbound support emails. Include SEO fields and tags, but do not publish it.
evals.expected_output: A JSON-compatible blog post package with title, slug, excerpt under 300 characters, markdown content without an H1, SEO metadata, and suggested tags.

evals.prompt: Add a sample seeded blog post to this repo about event-driven automations in HiGantic. Keep it scoped to the Convex blog seed flow.
evals.expected_output: A scoped repository edit using the existing blog seed pattern, preserving schema fields and computing reading time consistently.

evals.prompt: Create a publish-ready article page entry for a tutorial on building a weekly research agent. Include image prompt guidance and verification steps.
evals.expected_output: A complete post package plus practical repository-aware instructions for images, admin entry, and blog route verification.
